title: Xtra Citrusy Peruvian Seitan Seco De Cordero
description: A plant-based Peruvian dish featuring seitan, star anise, and citrus flavors, wrapped in lotus leaves for a fun and kid-friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together orange juice, lime juice, and dum, if using.
Add the seitan to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
In a small pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the garlic until fragrant.
Add the star anise pods to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Remove the seitan from the marinade and add it to the pan, cooking until browned on all sides.
Wrap each piece of seitan in a lotus leaf, spooning some of the cooking liquid and garlic over the top.
Place the wrapped seitan on a baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes.
Serve the seitan hot, garnished with additional citrus slices and star anise pods, if desired.
